versions.version_description: 4/4 time, though feels half time to me. Listen to the record to catch the changes. Ends on a strum of D.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

recommended.version_description: 4/4 Time. Arpeggios over the intro and the small interludes at the end of the choruses ending the song on a strum of Eb.

content:
Magic - sung by Olivia Newton-John and written by John Farrar

Others were close but contained a few minor mistakes
  (matters if you bring it to a choir but less if you sing and play it solo).
This is as published, and most accurate.

[Intro] 
[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D7b5[/ch]
Come take my hand[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
You should know me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
I've always been in your mind[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
You know I will be kind[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A13[/ch]  [ch]A9[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be guiding you[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]D7b5[/ch]
Building your dream[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Has to start now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
There's no other road to take[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You won't make a mistake[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A13[/ch]  [ch]A9[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I'll be guiding you[/tab]

[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D7b5[/ch]

[tab] [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C/Bb[/ch]
You have to believe we are magic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]C/Bb[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Nothing can stand in our way[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C/Bb[/ch]
You have to believe we are magic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]C/Bb[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]
Don't let your aim ever stray[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D7[/ch]                        [ch]Gm[/ch]
And if all your hopes survive[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm(maj7)[/ch]          [ch]D/A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]                         [ch]Em7b5[/ch]    [ch]A7(b9)[/ch]
I'll bring all your dreams alive[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
For you[/tab]
